# Task Tracker

> **Reset this file at the start of each new task/session.**
> Copy the template below, fill it in, and update as you go.

---

## Session: [Task or Feature Name]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD  
**Status:** 🔵 In Progress / ✅ Done / 🔴 Blocked

---

## Plan
> Written BEFORE any code is touched. Approved by developer before execution.

[Describe the approach in 2-3 sentences.]

---

## Steps

- [ ] Step 1: [specific action — file, component, or change]
- [ ] Step 2: [specific action]
- [ ] Step 3: [specific action]
- [ ] Step 4: Verify — run tests, lint, type-check
- [ ] Step 5: Report completion to developer

---

## Decisions Made

| Decision | Chosen | Why |
|----------|--------|-----|
| [topic]  | [choice] | [reasoning] |

---

## Blockers

| Blocker | What I Need | From Whom |
|---------|-------------|-----------|
| [describe] | [what unblocks it] | [developer / external] |

---

## Definition of Done

- [ ] All steps above completed
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] No new lint/type errors
- [ ] Developer has reviewed and confirmed
